Video.summary: Spring laughs with Easter fails, bug attacks, and funny baseball mishaps.
Video.title: Episode 1619

Video.summary: Graduation goofs, a dog vs. icemaker, funny cats, and a woman who limbos under a parking arm.
Video.title: Episode 1620

Video.summary: A groom causes a collision on the dance floor; a boy walks into a pole; and a - baby gets into Mom's makeup.
Video.title: Episode 411

Video.summary: A car makes a splash in a river; a little girl sneezes on a cake; - and a dog bites a man between the legs.
Video.title: Episode 413

Video.summary: Kids in a donkey costume fall off stage; a dog pulls a - little girl down a hill; and a - baby blows snot bubbles.
Video.title: Episode 414

Video.summary: Videos include a chicken bowling a strike; a referee - who makes a tackle; and a runner who hits every hurdle.
Video.title: Episode 415

Video.summary: A man hits his head on a barrel; - plus previous winners return to compete for the - $100,000 grand prize.
Video.title: Episode 417
